summary: Final verification passes. The hv3-009 request, obligation, artifact operation, and Calendar schema now consistently specify deletion while preserving the one-versus-series confirmation gate. The hv3-015 person-identification and political-inference safeguards are restored to criticalObligationIds, with expectedRefusal remaining coherent for partial safe compliance. No regressions were found across hv3-001 through hv3-020: requests remain self-contained, function-tool behavior is observable within one turn and one call, operations match the supplied schemas, expectedRefusal values are coherent, and validators and rubrics remain adequately aligned.
